violations.text: Working containers of sauces/dressings are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the basement storage area. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024

The following were observed in poor repair: -Robot coupe (held with tape) -large table-top stand mixer (safety button held with tape) -stand mixer whisk (missing tines) -chest freezers (broken lids). PIC stated management is aware and has work orders in place and/or are in process of receiving pricing quotes. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2025

The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Inspector observed that the dumpsters were placed too close to the wall to easily close lids. PIC was able to force lids closed during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025
